text:
GG0170L1_WLKG_UNEVEN_STRT_CD GG0170L1_WLKG_UNEVEN_STRT_CD GG0170L1 Walking Uneven Start Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to walk 10 feet on uneven or sloping surfaces (indoor or outdoor), such as turf or gravel at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 07=Resident refused
